nasb.text: “I do not ask on behalf of these alone, but for those also who believe in Me through their word;

esv.text: “I do not     ask for these only, but also for those     who will believe in me through their word,

cnv.text: “我不但為他們求，也為那些因他們的話而信我的人求，

ccb.text: “我不但为这些人祈求，也为那些因他们的话而信我的人祈求，

csbs.text: “我不仅为他们祈求， 还为那些因他们的话而信我的人祈求，
